body:
## Notes:
- Since version 26.2+, Mojang has introduced the Vulkan rendering engine. If your device does **not** support **Vulkan 1.2**, please do **not** use the **Vulkan backend** to launch the latest version of Minecraft.

## Updates:
- [GP#1112](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1112): Synced translations from [Weblate project](https://hosted.weblate.org/projects/zalithlauncher2/)
- [GP#1074](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1074): Use concurrency to check for updates when updating mods. by youfeng11
- [GP#1078](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1078): Added Korean language option. by youfeng11
- [GP#1080](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1080): Added screenshot manager to view/save all in-game screenshots. by youfeng11, MovTery
- [GP#1095](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1095): Removed high-overhead theme switch transition animations, only transition when toggling dark mode. by MovTery
- [GP#1099](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1099): Rewrote full-screen exit implementation to support SDK 35. by youfeng11, MovTery
- [GP#1103](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1103): Added extraction task description for JNA dependency project. by MovTery

## Refactors:
- [GP#1072](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1072): Do not enable domestic mirrors when downloading resources outside of China. by MovTery
- [GP#1083](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1083), [GP#1107](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1107): Refactored launcher theme to better align with [Material 3 Expressive](https://m3.material.io/blog/building-with-m3-expressive) design standards. by MovTery

## Changes:
- [GP#1086](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1086): Select All/Deselect All in Content Manager only applies to filtered results. by MovTery
- [GP#1111](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1111): Added ability to bypass account check through specific methods. by MovTery

## Fixes:
- [GP#1073](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1073): Fixed issues where some devices could not properly exit full-screen, potentially causing touch position anomalies. by MovTery
- [GP#1077](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1077): Added support for updating mods by selecting the version based on the mod's own loader. by youfeng11
- [GP#1089](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1089): Game info display window can now be manually closed. by MovTery
- [GP#1096](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1096): Adapted foreground service type restrictions for Android 14. by MovTery
- [GP#1106](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1106): Fixed top bar being obscured when full-screening the app on ChromeOS. by youfeng11
- [GP#1113](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1113): Prevented OptiFine and similar versions from entering the update loader page. by MovTery
